name: Compass Diversified Holdings
business: Compass Diversified Holdings is a holding company that acquires and actively manages a diversified group of middle-market businesses in North America. It categorizes its subsidiaries into branded consumer businesses (e.g., apparel, footwear, gear, synthetic insulation, feminine care, archery products) and industrial businesses (e.g., protective foam, magnetic systems, food warming systems). The company provides strategic and financial support to its subsidiaries, focusing on long-term value creation through operational improvements and disciplined acquisition.
sellsTo: Uniform stores, military exchanges, outdoor retail stores, own retail stores, and ecommerce (5.11)
Market-leading brands in footwear, snow sports, cycling, outdoor, athletic, workwear, headwear, and bracing (BOA)
Mass merchants, drug and grocery retail chains, online (The Honey Pot Co.)
National retail chains, dealer and distributor networks (Velocity Outdoor)
Customers in appliances, electronics, pharmaceuticals, health and wellness, automotive, building products (Altor)
Aerospace, defense, general industrial, motorsport/automotive, oil and gas, medical, energy, semiconductor (Arnold)
Consumer markets for food warming, lighting, home fragrance (Sterno)

exposures.sentence: 5.11 is a global apparel, footwear, and gear company serving consumers who demand performance, durability, and versatility across work, training, and adventure.
Arnold serves a variety of markets including aerospace and defense, general industrial, motorsport/ automotive, oil and gas, medical, energy, semiconductor and advertising specialties.
